title: Sub-decree No 74 on downsizing 3 131.5451 hectares in Ou Chum district, Ratanakiri province from forest cover 2002 and privatizing state land for granting purpose to Krung indigenous communal ownership for 4 communities and issuing ownership of land parcel
description: Land area of 3131.5451 hectares in Ou Chum district, Ratanakiri province has downsized from Forest Cover 2002 and reclassified as “State Private Land” for granting purpose as communal ownership to 4 Krung indigenous communities in Puy commune, Ou Chum district, Rattanakiri province.
